At the time of birth the balance of Mercury Oasa was 11 years 6

He purchased one Prize Bond 5 years ago. E won a prize and
received the cash during his Sun Oasa Moon Bhukti on a Friday when

Therefore he had his success ultimately. though there was long delay
for a period of 5 years. First one should know how normally one will
predict, and then the corrective method.
